news.title: Booked losses in stocks or mutual funds? Why filing ITR may still be important
news.description: For investors, a loss-making year does not necessarily eliminate the need to file an ITR. In many cases, filing the return within the due date can preserve an important tax benefit by allowing losses to be carried forward and adjusted against future gains.
